immutable_core.semantic_definition: One positive interval row per retained exact modality episode under the approved source-label inclusion rule.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per retained labeled episode interval
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Same-name assets must preserve the exact modality episode scope, label meaning, parent-link interpretation, and positive-only no-row rule.

episode_interval_contract.episode_start_rule: start at approved labeled source interval start
episode_interval_contract.episode_end_rule: end at approved labeled source interval end
episode_interval_contract.continuity_rule: merge only overlapping or exactly contiguous intervals with the same retained label unless a mapping-specific rule is explicitly approved
episode_interval_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained positive labeled episode under the approved source-label inclusion rule
